ads.title: Floating Ball Target Shooting Game
ads.description: Fun target game. It has a white and orange base. Multiple targets are present, including a large center target and smaller targets on top. Several white foam balls are included. Works great, missing one ball.

ads.author: Robert Kiedinger
ads.title: New Lady Luck Pinball Machine Backglass
ads.description: New backglass for a Lucky Lady pinball machine. Dimensions- 24.75"H x 26."W. Would be a replacement for a backglass except that the glasscutter mismeasured and it's 1/8" too tall. So it's a great work of art and conversation piece as is.

ads.author: Robert Kiedinger
ads.title: Pinball Scoring LEDS and Interconnect Board
ads.description: There is 1 seven-digit display, 1 display for credits and random number, and the interconnect board for the displays. They are original from a Williams system 7 machine, functioning 100%, no frizzing or missing numbers. $20 each. or $50 for all 3. Will ship for cost.

ads.author: Darrin Younger
ads.title: (PENDING) Arcade machine
ads.description: Marvel vs capcom clash of superheroes arcade machine. It’s the real deal. 4 player, coin operated. It turns on and lights up, says connect to the internet. I’m sure it works but it’s been on my porch for 10 months now and I haven’t touched it. Time to go. I’d like my hundred bucks back out of it

ads.title: Pga golf fore arcade machine
ads.description: Game will not booting have replaced hard drive replaced time keeper battery have replaced power supply have extra boards to go with it has 1 spot on front bottom needs fixing other than that cabinet really nice getting rid of some project machines making room for others Cash Only pick up only tallassee if listed its available will not respond to certain messages thanks for looking

ads.author: Julian Jackson
ads.title: TMNT arcade
ads.description: Basically brand new no scratches or anything adult owned and collector kept has original box. Has the riser in the box never used it. Only thing it’s missing is the handles for the controllers but everything still works as should can test it out before purchase!

ads.author: John Jackson
ads.title: NECA brand TMNT 4-pack. Original Arcade edition un-opened. No trades, sorry.
ads.description: Great condition with a slight dent in the corner of the box. Parting with some of my collectables to pay bills while waiting for partial unemployment to hit and I return to my job. Looking to part with this and have a few others I'll list later.

ads.author: Julian Nygren
ads.title: Empty Lode Runner arcade cabinet
ads.description: Empty Irem Lode Runner arcade cabinet with a Matsushita 19" monitor and Jamma harness. Monitor is untested, but I can guarantee that it doesn't work. Some of the bottom corners are busted, but it is in otherwise decent shape with little to no water damage. This is a pretty rare cab, but not a game that I am really interested it. Willing to trade for arcade parts. Will consider many things, but particularly parts from Ladybug, Sinistar, TMNT, and Jr. Pac-man. Nothing else in the photos is for sale, but I will be listing some other things soon.

Machine is fully functional including coin slots. For a collector, this is a really nice find. Located in Lacombe LA, pickup only.

ads.author: James Burnett
ads.title: Quick Draw Pinball machine

ads.author: Carlos Enrique Diaz
ads.title: Bally Hang Glider Pinball Machine
ads.description: NEEDS REPAIR / LIGHTS UP BUT DOESN'T WORK! Vintage Bally Hang Glider pinball machine from 1976. This electromechanical game has classic 70s artwork on backglass and cabinet. Cabinet is cream with blue and red graphics. Playfield is under glass and has original bumpers and flippers. Unit has metal legs and coin door. Great project piece for collectors. BEST OFFER OR TRADE GUN TRADES ARE ALSO WELCOME
